mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_message ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_message ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_message WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_message WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_ehs_message WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_message WHERE category = #{category}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_message SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_message (message_id, title, title_en, title_zh, category, sub_category, recipient, recipient_group, referrer, author_name, author_role, author_email, author_dept, author_company, views, send_date, detail, detail_en, detail_zh, entire_or_not, is_exist, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{title}, #{titleEn}, #{titleZh}, #{category}, #{subCategory}, #{recipient}, #{recipientGroup}, #{referrer}, #{authorName}, #{authorRole}, #{authorEmail}, #{authorDept}, #{authorCompany}, #{views}, #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{detail}, #{detailEn}, #{detailZh}, #{entireOrNot,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isExist,jdbcType=BIT}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_message SET title = #{title}, title_en = #{titleEn}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, category = #{category}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, recipient = #{recipient}, recipient_group = #{recipientGroup}, referrer = #{referrer}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_role = #{authorRole}, author_email = #{authorEmail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_company = #{authorCompany}, views = #{views}, send_date = #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, detail = #{detail}, detail_en = #{detailEn}, detail_zh = #{detailZh}, entire_or_not = #{entireOrNot,jdbcType=BIT}, is_exist = #{isExist,jdbcType=BIT}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
